title: Building an AI app: A low-code guide for small teams
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates a low-code approach to building AI applications by combining corporate data with Google Cloud databases like Cloud SQL and AlloyDB. The platform uses Gemini to automatically generate code for natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations, enabling small teams to build intelligent apps without extensive AI expertise.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through a low-code method for building AI applications that join corporate data with Cloud SQL and AlloyDB. Gemini auto-generates the code behind natural language interfaces, hybrid search, image search, and recommendations. The result lets small teams ship intelligent apps without deep AI expertise, with vector search and AI-assisted development handling the underlying work.
